mentions.note: Up 135% in 2025; trades 175x earnings but fastest-growing large-cap; bulls ignore valuation. Stock jumped 4% today on positive tape. Cramer big believer; no reason to back away. Needs fresh jolt but momentum intact.
Cramer likes it and momentum is not going away; however, storage plays (Seagate, SanDisk, Micron) are taking turn right now with all the money coming in; warn not to overstay welcome.
Client wins and business improvement consistent theme; every company Kramer hears about performs better after hiring Palantir; fundamentals remain compelling despite volatility.
Not momentum play but operational AI transformation story. When you hire them, business improves. Cramer not backing away despite 130→250→150 volatility; great opportunity to buy.
Software consulting company expecting terrific quarter; CEO Alex Karp is a fighter; stock will reignite after dormant period.
Only top-10 holding in IGV software ETF that reported terrific quarter; infrastructure software company with moat; exception to software selloff.

Great business model, really smart people, clients love them. Way ahead of itself near-term after pullback, but strong long-term hold. Down 24% YTD from Oct 2025 purchase at $188/share but EPS growth strong (234% GAP).

Great company, recently got hot then cooled; rebuilding base; strong business, customers love them, great product; Cramer thinks 2026-2027 will be great years. Rule of 40 juggernaut per caller (Chuck).
Caller Bill question: Cramer surprised PLTR hasn't been hurt more by Anthropic. Not hurt by OpenAI or others. Standing by it; not changing mind. Big move last year, digesting.
Software play dragged down by enterprise software sector rotation; down 7% despite cybersecurity angle.

Software/analytics for Pentagon; Trump endorsed on Truth Social citing war-fighting capabilities; down ~40% from Oct highs due to AI displacement fears but not regular software company; operational advisory tool for major CEOs.
AI consultant uncopyable by AI companies; wrongly grouped in software ETF; largest position, underbought; expect further strength.
Up 1,000%+ in 12 months on aerospace narrative. Up way too much; same story repeated. Don't pay these prices.
Caller concerned stock up then down with little net movement; Cramer sees as long-term holding; firing on all cylinders fundamentally but stock acts done—sentiment not justified by execution.
Market lost taste for expensive software; but Palantir is one-of-a-kind consulting firm with strong business & satisfied customers. Own it, don't trade it.
Software stock facing market headwind. Cramer mentions market hates software including Palantir.
AI applications layer company (data analytics). Cramer notes market sentiment has shifted negative on stock despite strong fundamentals; part of applications expansion.
Down 20% YTD but incredibly good company; let this one run. Amazing company, expensive stock, but hold and don't trim further.
Caller concerned about insider selling; Cramer has not lost faith in CEO Alex Karp; up $10; faith intact despite noise.
Long-term growth story; growth hasn't slowed, just the stock. Fine to own as long as you recognize it's multi-year bet, not a trading vehicle. Clubbed down today.
